prestazioni: Forced induction via Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (Journal Bearing, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) on the F20C1 engine, paired with a Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate and custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Full-Race Motorsports, supporting 12 psi of boost with a 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control

Full fuel system upgrade including a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), and a Hondata KPro V4 standalone ECU with custom basemap for the F20C1, optimized for E85 flex-fuel with AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor for AFR monitoring

Engine internals reinforcement with JE FSR forged pistons (87mm, 12.5:1 compression for forced induction), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-S billet crankshaft, paired with a Koyoritsu Racing titanium valve retainer set and Supertech dual valve springs for 9,000 RPM stability
estetica: Voltex Type-3 rear wing with carbon fiber construction and adjustable angle mounts, specifically designed for the AP2 chassis to reduce lift at high speeds without adding excessive drag

Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (AP2-specific) with extended carbon fiber fenders, front canards, and rear diffuser, paired with custom 5mm spacers for aggressive stance over Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +30 (front) and 18x10.5 +25 (rear) wheels

Custom interior roll cage by Buddy Club (AP2-specific bolt-in design) with integrated harness bar, wrapped in Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and Recaro SPG XL seats with custom Alcantara and red stitching, paired with a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm) and NRG quick-release hub
